plugins.name: olko:docs-index-keeper
plugins.description: Keep a Markdown docs index in sync through pre-commit, CI, or one-off maintenance flows.

plugins.name: olko:semantic-release-beta
plugins.description: Set up semantic-release-npm-github-publish with stable main releases and prerelease beta releases on a beta branch.

plugins.name: olko:gh-cli
plugins.description: Use the GitHub CLI effectively for repositories, PRs, Actions, releases, and more.

plugins.name: olko:git-commit
plugins.description: Create conventional commits with diff-aware staging and message generation.

plugins.name: olko:gallery
plugins.description: Create photo galleries with AI-assisted layout curation and sequencing.

plugins.name: olko:promptctl
plugins.description: Use promptctl for template-based prompt engineering, scoring, and workflow automation.

plugins.name: olko:fill-music-player
plugins.description: Fill a portable music player with a curated random selection from a source music library while balancing formats, artists, albums, and capacity.

plugins.name: olko:product-builder
plugins.description: Build a full-stack web application or SaaS product from a user description using production-oriented defaults.

plugins.name: olko:starter-rules
plugins.description: Load and enforce hard rules for every oleg-koval/* starter: 300-line files, E2E tests, pre-commit hooks, Vertical Slice architecture, no comments, KISS/DRY/SOLID.

plugins.name: olko:review-past-performance
plugins.description: Self-improvement loop that pulls the last 24h of ICM memories, git history, and skill analytics to detect repeated mistakes, slow workflows, and missing coverage, then proposes 1-3 concrete improvements.

plugins.name: olko:open-source-publisher
plugins.description: Prepare an open-source repository for public publishing with a minimal icon, social preview image, GitHub Pages site, README standardization, CI/CD checks, release hygiene, optional donation setup, and optional motion previews for generated static images.

plugins.name: olko:viral-launch
plugins.description: Set up a project repository and launch plan for shareable marketing, public launch readiness, and growth loops.

plugins.name: olko:search-console-indexing-audit
plugins.description: Analyze Google Search Console Coverage CSV exports and correlate them with sitemap, robots, canonical, redirect, and noindex signals.

plugins.name: olko:cloudflare-block-countries
plugins.description: Block specific countries via Cloudflare WAF Custom Rules using the Cloudflare API. Handles creating new rulesets and updating existing ones across single or multiple zones.

plugins.name: olko:obsidian-pr-sync
plugins.description: Fetch open GitHub PRs assigned to you or requesting your review, and write a grouped, age-sorted '## PRs to review' section into today's Obsidian daily note. Idempotent — re-running replaces the section.

plugins.name: olko:obsidian-task-rollover
plugins.description: Bullet-journal end-of-day task migration: copy unchecked tasks from today's Obsidian daily note to the next workday's note under '## Carried over', and mark them [>] in the source. Skips weekends, idempotent.
